3224030.name: KURU Soundtrack
3224030.description:
This is the soundtrack for the game KURU! Immerse yourself in a world of calm with our exclusive video game soundtrack, featuring six custom-made Lo-fi and chill tracks, crafted in-studio for ultimate relaxation. Each song is designed to create a soothing ambiance, perfect for unwinding after a long day or setting the mood for focused gameplay. Whether you're zoning out or finding your flow, these mellow beats are the perfect companion for your journey.

All assets are owned by Solbreak Studios LLC.
